_comment: Decel-ramp arrival demo (#520): a lone drilled Infantry unit sprints toward a move-order destination and must decelerate smoothly to a stop under decel, landing at (or very near) the ordered point instead of snapping current_speed to 0 and coasting past it. Scenario stages the unit alone (drill, no opponent) so the march runs uninterrupted. State ticks span the arrival window (see tools/demo/dump-state.sh) so current_speed and position can be asserted on exactly rather than eyeballed.
